summary: 4 film announcements, 3 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: FlySquad – First Strike!
film.talent: Cher, Bob Geldof (voice cast in talks)
film.announcement: Cher and Bob Geldof are in talks to voice roles in the animated feature film.

film.title: Austin Powers 4
film.announcement: Mike Myers confirms that Austin Powers 4 is happening, though minimal additional details were provided.

film.title: Love Letters of Our Life
film.announcement: Indonesian filmmaker Ismail Basbeth sets his next feature film project.

film.title: Maria José of Savoy
film.announcement: A film about Maria José of Savoy, Queen of Italy for only 27 days, is in development from filmmakers Ginevra Elkann and Marco Bellocchio.

tv.title: The Paris-Tokyo Job
tv.announcement: Studiocanal sets a true crime art heist docu-series launching at Sunny Side of the Doc.

tv.title: Apocalypse Civilizations: Rome
tv.announcement: A documentary series on the Battle of Actium between Octavian and Mark Antony and Cleopatra goes to France TV Distribution.

tv.title: Dímelo 3
tv.announcement: Mercedes Ron's Dímelo 3 is among local titles on Prime Video Spain's 2027 slate.
